name: ai-hub-apps
description: The Qualcomm® AI Hub apps are a collection of state-of-the-art machine learning models optimized for performance (latency, memory etc.) and ready to deploy on Qualcomm® devices.
summaryZh: The Qualcomm® AI Hub apps are a collection of state-of-the-art machine learning models optimized for performance (latency, memory etc.) and ready to deploy on Qualcomm® devices. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
